description: The entity also selects and develops general control activities over technology to support the achievement of objectives.

subcriteria.name: it_governance
subcriteria.reference_text: IT governance framework or IT strategic plan documenting technology risks and control activities. IT risk assessment identifying infrastructure, application, and security risks with corresponding controls.

subcriteria.name: infrastructure_controls
subcriteria.reference_text: Control activities over technology infrastructure including cloud configuration management, server hardening, network security, and access management. Infrastructure as code managed in Terraform, CloudFormation, or similar tools.

subcriteria.name: security_management
subcriteria.reference_text: Security management controls restricting technology access to authorized users. IAM policies, role-based access, and principle of least privilege enforced across cloud and on-premise systems.

mismatch_signals.reason: Physical access controls are not technology general controls.
Fraud risk assessment is not technology general controls.
